item.title: Armed forces likely to see big-ticket approvals at DAC meet on Thursday
item.description: DAC may consider ₹2.7 trillion Rafale deal, Scalp missiles and other key Army, Navy and Air Force acquisitions at upcoming meet

item.title: India's first cross-sector investment trust in works to monetise assets
item.description: The move comes as the NITI Aayog, the government's policy think tank, looks to bring state governments on board for NMP 2.0

item.title: Industrial Relations Code Amendment Bill introduced in Lok Sabha
item.description: Seeking to avoid any "future unwarranted complication" over continuity of certain laws replaced by the Industrial Relations Code of 2020, an amendment...

item.title: All about the Consumer Price Index: How India tracks retail inflation
item.description: CPI tracks retail price changes across India; January 2026 inflation data shifts to a new 2024 base year reflecting updated spending patterns

item.title: Retail inflation: A brief history before new data series launch on Thursday
item.description: India's retail inflation gauge has evolved from fragmented worker-specific indices to a unified CPI framework that now anchors monetary policy and wel...
